style_families.fallback_reason: vacation or resort request defaults to the airy romantic route

prompt_shell.subject_hint: airy romantic resort dress with soft feminine movement
prompt_shell.scene_hint: sunlit resort-inspired set with warm ivory and sand tones
prompt_shell.lighting_hint: soft directional daylight with gentle shadow falloff
prompt_shell.styling_hint: relaxed feminine movement with clean commercial resort styling

style_families.fallback_reason: transitional or non-vacation casual demand defaults to the clean minimal route

prompt_shell.subject_hint: clean minimal dress with quiet seam language and low-noise surface
prompt_shell.scene_hint: pared-back tonal studio with uncluttered product-first framing
prompt_shell.lighting_hint: even softbox lighting that keeps color and seams easy to read
prompt_shell.styling_hint: low-noise product styling with controlled pose and no editorial exaggeration

style_families.fallback_reason: default route for requests without stronger vacation, casual-minimal, or party signals

prompt_shell.subject_hint: structured polished city dress with sharper commuter-friendly proportion
prompt_shell.scene_hint: urban showroom backdrop with clean architectural restraint
prompt_shell.lighting_hint: clean directional commercial light that sharpens seam placement
prompt_shell.styling_hint: sharp commuter-ready styling with composed posture and polished restraint

style_families.fallback_reason: party demand defaults to the fitted evening route

prompt_shell.subject_hint: sleek fitted evening dress with stronger after-dark line emphasis
prompt_shell.scene_hint: nightlife-inspired dark studio with clean reflective restraint
prompt_shell.lighting_hint: high-contrast evening light that keeps the fitted shape crisp
prompt_shell.styling_hint: confident after-dark pose with sharper attitude but clean ecommerce readability
